title: Complete MP Report fixture — Corbyn, Jeremy

subject.notes: Official UK Parliament records verify the member ID, current constituency, current parliamentary affiliation and continuous service start. The repository retains surname-first presentation for deterministic output compatibility.

scope.scope_statement: Fixture proof of the canonical Complete MP Report v1 structure and generator, now including a bounded official UK Parliament identity and parliamentary-service baseline. Other research lanes remain incomplete.
scope.notes: UK Parliament verifies continuous Commons service since 9 June 1983. The identity-and-career section remains partial because the full historic election and boundary chronology has not been independently assessed.

publication.notes: Fixture output must not be treated as a public profile.

sections.title: Identity and parliamentary career
sections.summary: Official UK Parliament records verify member ID 185, current Islington North representation, current Your Party affiliation and continuous Commons service since 9 June 1983; the full career chronology remains partial.

sections.title: Roles and committees
sections.summary: Official UK Parliament records identify one current parliamentary-leadership post, two previous leadership posts and two committee memberships; exhaustive historic role and committee coverage is not claimed.

sections.title: Voting record and coverage
sections.summary: Repository machinery exists for available Commons votes and controlled historic batches, but complete coverage is not established.

sections.title: Financial interests
sections.summary: Official UK Parliament records show 29 entries in the current published snapshot dated 13 July 2026; historical coverage remains incomplete because the current display is subject to a twelve-month retention boundary.

sections.title: Donations and political finance
sections.summary: The Electoral Commission export captured on 20 July 2026 contains 40 unique regulated-donee donation records for Mr Jeremy Corbyn MP (entity ID 1600): 18 cash, 10 non-cash, 10 visit, one impermissible-donor and one unidentified-donor record. Loans, party/entity finance, campaign spending, threshold effects and records outside the Commission database remain outside this lane.

sections.title: Outside work and company links
sections.summary: The four company or organisation links explicitly displayed in the current 13 July 2026 UK Parliament register snapshot have been resolved against official Companies House records; earlier outside-work and company history remains incomplete.

sections.title: Speeches and parliamentary questions
sections.summary: The official UK Parliament APIs yielded 90 unique Commons written questions tabled by Jeremy Corbyn from 4 July 2024 through the 20 July 2026 capture boundary. Eighty-nine had an answer date and one remained unanswered at capture time. Earlier written questions, later updates, oral questions, written statements, Early Day Motions and spoken contributions remain outside this lane.

sections.title: Public positions over time
sections.summary: No reviewed position timeline is present.

sections.title: Changes and contradictions
sections.summary: No contradiction claim should be made until dated positions and explanations are reviewed.

sections.title: Organisations and evidenced relationships
sections.summary: No real relationship records are present in the fixture.

sections.title: Evidence gaps
sections.summary: The fixture explicitly records major evidence and access gaps.

sections.title: Source register
sections.summary: Official UK Parliament identity sources are registered, but authoritative public sources for most report sections remain incomplete.

sections.title: Human review
sections.summary: Only the fixture boundary has been reviewed; substantive review remains outstanding.

sources.title: Electoral Commission regulated-donee donations export — Jeremy Corbyn
sources.limitations: Raw UTF-8 CSV export captured from the Electoral Commission search. The export contains 40 unique ECRef rows and 29 columns. The raw CSV is not committed under this five-file lane; every field is preserved verbatim in the machine-readable packet. The mechanical total includes one returned impermissible-donor record and one returned unidentified-donor record.

sources.title: Donations and loans to regulated organisations and individuals
sources.limitations: Defines regulated donees and monthly reporting. It does not establish the content of any Jeremy Corbyn row; row data comes only from the official export.

sources.title: UK Parliament Members API — Jeremy Corbyn written questions index
sources.limitations: The Members API reported 251 all-career records across 13 page requests. The packet retains compact reconciliation metadata for all 251 records and exact index wrappers for the 90 records inside the current-Parliament date boundary. The source checksum is a manifest checksum over the 13 raw-response SHA-256 values recorded by the capture, not a checksum of one HTTP response.

sources.title: UK Parliament Written Questions Service API — current-Parliament Jeremy Corbyn question details
sources.limitations: The diagnostic capture preserved all 90 parsed official detail payloads but, because its validator rejected the direct askingMemberId field before record promotion, it did not retain individual raw-response byte hashes. The complete diagnostic file is fixed by SHA-256 af77384595f9bc8898e3a4812984bd3b3d95d84e1cf175bef386ed2f62ccec4b; each preserved detail payload also has a packet-internal canonical JSON checksum. One question had no answer date or answer text at capture time.
